title: Return to Silent Hill
posterAlt: Return to Silent Hill (2026) movie poster
tmdbOverview: When James receives a mysterious letter from his lost love Mary, he is drawn to Silent Hill—a once-familiar town now consumed by darkness. As he searches for her, James faces monstrous creatures and unravels a terrifying truth that will push him to the edge of his sanity.
synopsis: Return to Silent Hill is a 2026 mystery, drama and horror film from United Kingdom and United States. It has a 4.0 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
